1.text: Ya Allah, You are my Lord, none is worthy of worship but You, You created me and I am Your servant, so forgive me and have mercy on me
Ya Allah, You are the One, the Eternal, to You I turn in every need, so fulfil my needs
Ya Allah, You alone deserve worship, make my heart sincere for You alone
Ya Allah, Lord of the heavens and the earth, guide me and do not let me go astray
Ya Allah, You are free of need from me, and I am in need of You, so have mercy on my need
Ya Allah, You are the All-Hearing, All-Knowing, hear my dua and accept it
Ya Allah, You are the Ever-Living, Sustainer, give life to my heart through Your remembrance
Ya Allah, You are Most Merciful, forgive me and do not punish me
Ya Allah, You are Master of the Day of Judgment, make my reckoning easy
Ya Allah, You are Near and Responsive, answer my dua and do not turn me away

2.text: Ya Ar-Rahmaan, Your mercy encompasses everything, have mercy on me with a mercy that suffices me
Ya Ar-Rahmaan, have mercy on my weak heart
Ya Ar-Rahmaan, have mercy on me in this life and the next
Ya Ar-Rahmaan, make me among the people of Your mercy
Ya Ar-Rahmaan, have mercy on my parents as they raised me
Ya Ar-Rahmaan, have mercy on my weakness and ignorance
Ya Ar-Rahmaan, do not withhold Your mercy from me
Ya Ar-Rahmaan, let Your mercy be what leads me to Jannah
Ya Ar-Rahmaan, have mercy on my family, my ummah, and those I love
Ya Ar-Rahmaan, do not punish me while You are the Most Merciful

3.text: Ya Ar-Raheem, You are merciful to Your servants, grant me a special mercy
Ya Ar-Raheem, have mercy on me on the Day no one else can
Ya Ar-Raheem, make me among those who receive Your special mercy
Ya Ar-Raheem, have mercy on my heart and forgive my sins
Ya Ar-Raheem, have mercy on me in my grave and after my death
Ya Ar-Raheem, make my akhirah mercy and forgiveness
Ya Ar-Raheem, do not let me despair of Your mercy
Ya Ar-Raheem, have mercy on me and accept my repentance
Ya Ar-Raheem, make my heart soft through Your mercy
Ya Ar-Raheem, admit me into Your Jannah through Your mercy

4.text: Ya Al-Malik, You own all dominion, decree what is best for my life and my akhirah
Ya Al-Malik, You are the Just Ruler, judge my affairs with truth and do not allow injustice upon me
Ya Al-Malik, all dominion is in Your hand, grant me pure and blessed provision
Ya Al-Malik, You control everything, rectify all of my affairs
Ya Al-Malik, You honour whom You will and humiliate whom You will, honour me through obedience to You
Ya Al-Malik, there is no true king but You, do not let my heart attach to anything besides You
Ya Al-Malik, You are the King of the Day of Judgment, make my reckoning easy on that Day
Ya Al-Malik, You are able over all things, help me overcome my nafs and Shaytan
Ya Al-Malik, You are the Lord of the heavens and the earth, protect me and my family from all harm
Ya Al-Malik, to You all matters return, make my akhirah better than my dunya

5.text: Ya Al-Quddus, You are free from all imperfection, purify my heart from sins
Ya Al-Quddus, You are free from all imperfection, cleanse me from my sins
Ya Al-Quddus, You are perfect in Your attributes, make my character beautiful
Ya Al-Quddus, purify my tongue from lying and backbiting
Ya Al-Quddus, purify my sight from what is forbidden
Ya Al-Quddus, cleanse my heart from hypocrisy and envy
Ya Al-Quddus, make my heart sincere for You alone
Ya Al-Quddus, purify my life from sins
Ya Al-Quddus, make me among those who are pure outwardly and inwardly
Ya Al-Quddus, do not let anything enter my heart that displeases You

6.text: Ya As-Salaam, You are peace and from You is peace, place tranquillity in my heart and my life
Ya As-Salaam, protect me from every harm, trial, and affliction
Ya As-Salaam, make my heart content through Your remembrance
Ya As-Salaam, grant me safety in my religion, my life, and my akhirah
Ya As-Salaam, protect me and my family from all evil
Ya As-Salaam, grant us a good ending and save us from Your punishment
Ya As-Salaam, do not place anxiety or unrest in my heart
Ya As-Salaam, make my life balanced and my akhirah successful
Ya As-Salaam, fix my relationships and place peace between us
Ya As-Salaam, enter me into the home of peace through Your mercy

7.text: Ya Al-Mumin, You grant safety to Your servants, make my heart secure from every fear except You
Ya Al-Mumin, increase me in faith and certainty in You
Ya Al-Mumin, make my heart firm upon Your religion
Ya Al-Mumin, grant me safety on the Day of Judgment from its terror
Ya Al-Mumin, protect me from doubts and desires
Ya Al-Mumin, make my heart content with Your decree
Ya Al-Mumin, do not place over me those who do not fear You
Ya Al-Mumin, keep me always in Your protection and safety
Ya Al-Mumin, make my faith strong and unshaken
Ya Al-Mumin, protect my family, my children, and those I love

8.text: Ya Al-Muhaymin, You watch over everything, protect me in private and in public
Ya Al-Muhaymin, You preserve all things, protect my heart from deviation
Ya Al-Muhaymin, watch over my actions and purify my intentions
Ya Al-Muhaymin, protect me from every harm I cannot see
Ya Al-Muhaymin, do not leave me to myself even for a moment
Ya Al-Muhaymin, guard my family, my children, and my home
Ya Al-Muhaymin, keep me under Your constant protection
Ya Al-Muhaymin, safeguard my religion and my faith from loss
Ya Al-Muhaymin, make my deeds preserved and accepted
Ya Al-Muhaymin, do not let me be lost while You are the Best of protectors

9.text: Ya Al-Azeez, You are powerful and dominant, grant me honour through Your religion
Ya Al-Azeez, none gives honour except You, honour my heart through obedience
Ya Al-Azeez, do not humiliate me because of my sins
Ya Al-Azeez, grant me victory over those who wrong me
Ya Al-Azeez, make me strong and honoured upon truth
Ya Al-Azeez, do not let love of the dunya humiliate me
Ya Al-Azeez, strengthen my faith and raise my rank
Ya Al-Azeez, make my honour in closeness to You
Ya Al-Azeez, protect me from the humiliation of sin
Ya Al-Azeez, do not disgrace me on the Day of Judgment

10.text: Ya Al-Jabbaar, You mend what is broken, mend my broken heart
Ya Al-Jabbaar, restore me after my brokenness and strengthen me after weakness
Ya Al-Jabbaar, do not leave me in weakness, strengthen me with Your power
Ya Al-Jabbaar, heal my pain and raise me after hardship
Ya Al-Jabbaar, You are the Most High and Dominant, subdue my soul away from sin
Ya Al-Jabbaar, fix what is broken in my life
Ya Al-Jabbaar, restore me with Your mercy and do not let me be lost
Ya Al-Jabbaar, mend my heart, my soul, and my condition
Ya Al-Jabbaar, do not leave me to myself, restore me with Your generosity
Ya Al-Jabbaar, make ease after hardship and restoration after brokenness

11.text: Ya Al-Mutakabbir, You are the Most High, purify me from arrogance
Ya Al-Mutakabbir, greatness belongs only to You, make me humble
Ya Al-Mutakabbir, cleanse my heart from pride
Ya Al-Mutakabbir, do not make me among the arrogant
Ya Al-Mutakabbir, make my dignity in worshipping You
Ya Al-Mutakabbir, protect me from arrogance of the heart
Ya Al-Mutakabbir, make my heart humble before You
Ya Al-Mutakabbir, do not make love of people greater than love of You
Ya Al-Mutakabbir, grant me true humility
Ya Al-Mutakabbir, make me small in my own eyes and great in Your sight

12.text: Ya Al-Khaaliq, You created me and know me best, perfect my character and form
Ya Al-Khaaliq, You created me for worship, keep me firm upon it
Ya Al-Khaaliq, beautify my character as You beautified my creation
Ya Al-Khaaliq, do not make me heedless of Your wisdom
Ya Al-Khaaliq, make my character good and my intentions sincere
Ya Al-Khaaliq, grant me gratitude for Your blessings
Ya Al-Khaaliq, make me among Your righteous servants
Ya Al-Khaaliq, do not make my creation a cause of my destruction
Ya Al-Khaaliq, direct my life towards Your pleasure
Ya Al-Khaaliq, make me among those who understand Your wisdom

13.text: Ya Al-Baari, You brought everything into existence, perfect the beginning and end of my life
Ya Al-Baari, You create with wisdom, make my life based upon wisdom
Ya Al-Baari, fix my condition and straighten my path
Ya Al-Baari, make me among those who are blessed in life
Ya Al-Baari, You begin and return, make my ending good
Ya Al-Baari, make my actions blessed and accepted
Ya Al-Baari, do not make my life without purpose
Ya Al-Baari, guide me to what I was created for
Ya Al-Baari, make me among Your righteous servants
Ya Al-Baari, perfect my affairs and my intentions

14.text: Ya Al-Musawwir, You shaped me in the best form, beautify my character
Ya Al-Musawwir, do not make my appearance a cause of trial
Ya Al-Musawwir, make my beauty in obedience to You
Ya Al-Musawwir, beautify my outward and inward
Ya Al-Musawwir, make me among the best in character
Ya Al-Musawwir, do not make my heart ugly
Ya Al-Musawwir, adorn me with the light of faith
Ya Al-Musawwir, make my form a means of closeness to You
Ya Al-Musawwir, protect me from self-delusion
Ya Al-Musawwir, make me beautiful in Your sight

15.text: Ya Al-Ghaffaar, forgive all my sins
Ya Al-Ghaffaar, You forgive abundantly, do not take me to account for my sins
Ya Al-Ghaffaar, accept my sincere repentance
Ya Al-Ghaffaar, do not let my sins block me from You
Ya Al-Ghaffaar, cleanse me from sins
Ya Al-Ghaffaar, make me among those who repent often
Ya Al-Ghaffaar, do not expose my sins on the Day of Judgment
Ya Al-Ghaffaar, make Your forgiveness vast for me
Ya Al-Ghaffaar, do not destroy me because of my sins

16.text: Ya Al-Qahhaar, You subdue all things, subdue my soul away from sin
Ya Al-Qahhaar, overpower my desires and my nafs
Ya Al-Qahhaar, do not let anything have power over me except through You
Ya Al-Qahhaar, help me overcome myself and Shaytan
Ya Al-Qahhaar, make my heart humble before You
Ya Al-Qahhaar, protect me from the strength of trials
Ya Al-Qahhaar, do not let sins overpower me
Ya Al-Qahhaar, make Your power apparent in my life
Ya Al-Qahhaar, subdue my enemies with truth
Ya Al-Qahhaar, do not place over me an oppressive soul

17.text: Ya Al-Wahhaab, grant me mercy from Yourself
Ya Al-Wahhaab, grant me pure and blessed provision
Ya Al-Wahhaab, grant me a pure heart
Ya Al-Wahhaab, grant me success in all my affairs
Ya Al-Wahhaab, grant me goodness in this life and the next
Ya Al-Wahhaab, grant me beneficial knowledge
Ya Al-Wahhaab, grant me righteous offspring
Ya Al-Wahhaab, grant me Your forgiveness and mercy
Ya Al-Wahhaab, do not withhold any good You have written for me
Ya Al-Wahhaab, grant me a good ending

18.text: Ya Ar-Razzaaq, You are the Best of providers, grant me lawful and pure provision
Ya Ar-Razzaaq, do not make me dependent on anyone besides You
Ya Ar-Razzaaq, place barakah in my provision
Ya Ar-Razzaaq, open for me the doors of provision
Ya Ar-Razzaaq, provide for me from where I do not expect
Ya Ar-Razzaaq, do not make the dunya my greatest concern
Ya Ar-Razzaaq, do not make my provision a trial for me
Ya Ar-Razzaaq, grant me gratitude for Your blessings
Ya Ar-Razzaaq, make my provision a means to obey You

19.text: Ya Al-Fattaah, open for me the doors of mercy
Ya Al-Fattaah, open for me the doors of provision
Ya Al-Fattaah, open for me understanding of the Quran
Ya Al-Fattaah, open my heart for Your remembrance
Ya Al-Fattaah, open for me the path of goodness
Ya Al-Fattaah, do not close Your doors to me
Ya Al-Fattaah, judge between me and those who wrong me with truth
Ya Al-Fattaah, open every difficult matter for me
Ya Al-Fattaah, open for me the doors of repentance
Ya Al-Fattaah, open for me the goodness of this life and the next

20.text: Ya Al-Aleem, You know what is in my heart, so rectify it
Ya Al-Aleem, teach me what benefits me
Ya Al-Aleem, increase me in beneficial knowledge
Ya Al-Aleem, do not let my ignorance be my destruction
Ya Al-Aleem, grant me understanding and wisdom
Ya Al-Aleem, protect my heart from doubts
Ya Al-Aleem, make my knowledge a proof for me, not against me
Ya Al-Aleem, nothing is hidden from You, so have mercy on my weakness
Ya Al-Aleem, guide me to the path of truth
Ya Al-Aleem, make me among those of knowledge and action

21.text: Ya Al-Qaabid, do not withhold Your mercy from me
Ya Al-Qaabid, if You take something from me, replace it with something better
Ya Al-Qaabid, protect my heart during hardship
Ya Al-Qaabid, do not make Your withholding a punishment for me
Ya Al-Qaabid, grant me patience in loss
Ya Al-Qaabid, do not block Your grace from me
Ya Al-Qaabid, make Your withholding wisdom for me
Ya Al-Qaabid, do not withdraw my heart from Your remembrance
Ya Al-Qaabid, protect me from the trials of poverty
Ya Al-Qaabid, make me content with Your decree

22.text: Ya Al-Baasit, expand my heart with the light of faith
Ya Al-Baasit, expand my knowledge and understanding
Ya Al-Baasit, expand goodness in my life
Ya Al-Baasit, do not make my life constricted
Ya Al-Baasit, expand for me Your mercy
Ya Al-Baasit, expand for me Your success
Ya Al-Baasit, expand my heart through Your remembrance
Ya Al-Baasit, do not withhold goodness from me
Ya Al-Baasit, expand my rank in Jannah

23.text: Ya Al-Khaafid, lower my heart away from arrogance
Ya Al-Khaafid, do not lower me because of my sins
Ya Al-Khaafid, humble my soul away from sin
Ya Al-Khaafid, make me humble for You
Ya Al-Khaafid, do not let love of dunya raise me above obedience to You
Ya Al-Khaafid, lower the harm of my enemies away from me
Ya Al-Khaafid, make me small in my own eyes
Ya Al-Khaafid, reduce hardship from me
Ya Al-Khaafid, do not lower my rank in the akhirah
Ya Al-Khaafid, make my brokenness a means of closeness to You

24.text: Ya Ar-Raafi, raise my rank in this life and the next
Ya Ar-Raafi, raise me through knowledge and faith
Ya Ar-Raafi, raise my heart through Your remembrance
Ya Ar-Raafi, do not raise others over me unjustly
Ya Ar-Raafi, raise me when I fall
Ya Ar-Raafi, make my elevation in obedience to You
Ya Ar-Raafi, lift humiliation away from me
Ya Ar-Raafi, raise my mention among people with goodness
Ya Ar-Raafi, raise me in ranks in Jannah
Ya Ar-Raafi, make my elevation a means of my salvation

25.text: Ya Al-Muizz, honour me through Your religion
Ya Al-Muizz, do not make my honour in other than You
Ya Al-Muizz, honour my heart through obedience
Ya Al-Muizz, do not humiliate me through sin
Ya Al-Muizz, honour my family and my ummah
Ya Al-Muizz, make my honour in closeness to You
Ya Al-Muizz, honour me with truth
Ya Al-Muizz, do not make me seek honour from others
Ya Al-Muizz, make me noble in Your sight
Ya Al-Muizz, honour me on the Day of Judgment

26.text: Ya Al-Mudhill, do not disgrace me in this life or the next
Ya Al-Mudhill, disgrace the enemies of truth
Ya Al-Mudhill, do not let my sins be my humiliation
Ya Al-Mudhill, humble my ego away from arrogance
Ya Al-Mudhill, protect me from the humiliation of sin
Ya Al-Mudhill, do not place over me one who humiliates me
Ya Al-Mudhill, make my humility to You my honour
Ya Al-Mudhill, do not make me among the humiliated
Ya Al-Mudhill, make my humbling a means of repentance
Ya Al-Mudhill, do not disgrace me on the Day of Judgment

27.text: Ya As-Samee, hear my dua and do not turn me away
Ya As-Samee, You hear my secrets and what I say openly, so have mercy on me
Ya As-Samee, hear my complaint and relieve my worries
Ya As-Samee, do not make my supplication rejected
Ya As-Samee, hear the dua of my heart before my tongue
Ya As-Samee, answer my call when I am weak
Ya As-Samee, do not block my voice from reaching You
Ya As-Samee, make my dua accepted
Ya As-Samee, hear me whenever I call upon You
Ya As-Samee, make my tongue constantly remembering You

28.text: Ya Al-Baseer, You see my entire condition, so have mercy on my weakness
Ya Al-Baseer, nothing is hidden from You, so guide me
Ya Al-Baseer, make my sight see the truth
Ya Al-Baseer, purify my sight from what is forbidden
Ya Al-Baseer, protect me from the trials of the gaze
Ya Al-Baseer, show me truth as truth
Ya Al-Baseer, do not make my sight a cause of my destruction
Ya Al-Baseer, direct my gaze to what pleases You
Ya Al-Baseer, make my heart see with Your light
Ya Al-Baseer, protect me from heedlessness

29.text: Ya Al-Hakam, judge between me and truth
Ya Al-Hakam, judge in my favour and not against me
Ya Al-Hakam, make Your judgment upon me mercy
Ya Al-Hakam, do not wrong me while You are Just
Ya Al-Hakam, make my decisions based on truth
Ya Al-Hakam, judge between me and those who wronged me
Ya Al-Hakam, make me among the people of justice
Ya Al-Hakam, do not make Your judgment upon me a punishment
Ya Al-Hakam, make my deeds accepted
Ya Al-Hakam, decree for me Jannah

30.text: Ya Al-Adl, You never wrong anyone, so do not wrong me
Ya Al-Adl, make Your justice mercy for me
Ya Al-Adl, do not take me to account except with mercy
Ya Al-Adl, make me just in my life
Ya Al-Adl, protect me from wronging myself
Ya Al-Adl, do not make me unjust to others
Ya Al-Adl, make Your justice apparent in my affairs
Ya Al-Adl, return my rights to me
Ya Al-Adl, do not let my rights be lost
Ya Al-Adl, make my akhirah just and successful

31.text: Ya Al-Lateef, be gentle with me in what You have decreed
Ya Al-Lateef, be gentle with me in all my affairs
Ya Al-Lateef, provide for me from where I do not expect through Your gentleness
Ya Al-Lateef, do not deal with me by Your justice, but deal with me by Your gentleness
Ya Al-Lateef, be kind to my heart during hardship
Ya Al-Lateef, fix my condition through hidden kindness
Ya Al-Lateef, make Your gentleness with me in every step
Ya Al-Lateef, do not deprive me of Your hidden kindness
Ya Al-Lateef, be gentle with me in my future
Ya Al-Lateef, make my ending filled with gentleness and mercy

32.text: Ya Al-Khabeer, You are fully aware of my condition, so have mercy on me
Ya Al-Khabeer, nothing is hidden from You, so guide me
Ya Al-Khabeer, make Your knowledge of me a cause of mercy for me
Ya Al-Khabeer, fix my inner state as You know it
Ya Al-Khabeer, do not expose my sins
Ya Al-Khabeer, protect me from the evil You know within me
Ya Al-Khabeer, make my knowledge beneficial through Your knowledge
Ya Al-Khabeer, do not let my hidden state be my destruction
Ya Al-Khabeer, guide me to what You know is best for me
Ya Al-Khabeer, make my ending upon goodness

33.text: Ya Al-Haleem, You do not hasten punishment, so be patient with me
Ya Al-Haleem, do not punish me quickly for my sins
Ya Al-Haleem, grant me patience and forbearance
Ya Al-Haleem, make me gentle and patient with people
Ya Al-Haleem, conceal me and pardon me
Ya Al-Haleem, do not take me to account for my ignorance
Ya Al-Haleem, make my patience a means of salvation
Ya Al-Haleem, do not let my anger destroy me
Ya Al-Haleem, grant me calmness of heart
Ya Al-Haleem, make Your pardon a path to Your mercy

34.text: Ya Al-Azeem, You are beyond comprehension, make Your greatness firm in my heart
Ya Al-Azeem, do not let anything be greater than You in my heart
Ya Al-Azeem, forgive my great sins
Ya Al-Azeem, make me among those who honour You
Ya Al-Azeem, do not magnify the dunya in my heart
Ya Al-Azeem, make fear of You great in my heart
Ya Al-Azeem, make my worship full of reverence
Ya Al-Azeem, do not let my heart take sins lightly
Ya Al-Azeem, make Your greatness apparent in my life
Ya Al-Azeem, make me among the humble

35.text: Ya Al-Ghafoor, forgive all my sins
Ya Al-Ghafoor, do not deprive me of Your forgiveness
Ya Al-Ghafoor, accept my sincere repentance
Ya Al-Ghafoor, do not punish me for my sins
Ya Al-Ghafoor, make Your forgiveness vast for me
Ya Al-Ghafoor, make me among those forgiven
Ya Al-Ghafoor, do not expose me on the Day of Judgment
Ya Al-Ghafoor, cleanse me from sins
Ya Al-Ghafoor, make my ending forgiveness

36.text: Ya Ash-Shakoor, You accept even little deeds, accept my actions

Ya Ash-Shakoor, make my deeds accepted
Ya Ash-Shakoor, increase me from Your bounty
Ya Ash-Shakoor, make me among the grateful
Ya Ash-Shakoor, do not make me among those who deny Your blessings
Ya Ash-Shakoor, make my gratitude a cause of increase
Ya Ash-Shakoor, accept even my weak deeds through Your mercy
Ya Ash-Shakoor, do not let my dua be lost
Ya Ash-Shakoor, make my reward great with You

Ya Al-Aliyy, do not let my heart be attached to lowly things
Ya Al-Aliyy, raise my rank through faith
Ya Al-Aliyy, make my ambitions high for Your sake
Ya Al-Aliyy, do not lower me while You are the Most High

Ya Al-Aliyy, raise me when I fall
Ya Al-Aliyy, make my heart attached to the heavens
Ya Al-Aliyy, do not make the dunya my greatest concern
Ya Al-Aliyy, make me among the people of the highest ranks in Jannah

Ya Al-Kabeer, make the dunya small in my eyes

Ya Al-Kabeer, make me among those who are humble before You

Ya Al-Hafeez, protect my heart from deviation
Ya Al-Hafeez, protect my family and my children
Ya Al-Hafeez, protect me from the trials of this world
Ya Al-Hafeez, do not leave me to myself
Ya Al-Hafeez, protect me in private and in public
Ya Al-Hafeez, protect my deeds from corruption
Ya Al-Hafeez, protect my tongue from error
Ya Al-Hafeez, make Your protection always with me

Ya Al-Muqeet, do not make me in need of anyone besides You
Ya Al-Muqeet, sustain me in this life and the next

Ya Al-Haseeb, take account of me with mercy
Ya Al-Haseeb, do not make my reckoning difficult
Ya Al-Haseeb, make my account easy
Ya Al-Haseeb, You are enough for me in every matter

Ya Al-Haseeb, make me rely upon You
Ya Al-Haseeb, do not let me fear anyone besides You
Ya Al-Haseeb, protect me from a bad reckoning

Ya Al-Waasi, expand my heart with faith

47.text: Ya Al-Hakeem, You are wise in Your creation, make my life upon wisdom

Ya Al-Baaqi, make Your giving lasting
Ya Al-Baaqi, do not deprive me of Your lasting mercy
Ya Al-Baaqi, make my heart aware of the Hereafter
Ya Al-Baaqi, make my ending everlasting success

98.text: Ya Al-Waarith, You inherit everything, so forgive me
Ya Al-Waarith, make me an inheritor of Jannah
Ya Al-Waarith, do not make me among the losers
Ya Al-Waarith, make my ending good
Ya Al-Waarith, make my heart aware of the temporary nature of life
Ya Al-Waarith, do not make me attached to dunya
Ya Al-Waarith, make me among the inheritors of Firdaws
Ya Al-Waarith, make my deeds lasting
Ya Al-Waarith, do not deprive me of the inheritance of Jannah
Ya Al-Waarith, make my ending Jannah

99.text: Ya Ar-Rasheed, guide me to the path of truth
Ya Ar-Rasheed, do not misguide me
Ya Ar-Rasheed, make my decisions wise
Ya Ar-Rasheed, grant me sound judgement
Ya Ar-Rasheed, make my heart guided
Ya Ar-Rasheed, do not make me heedless
Ya Ar-Rasheed, make my life upon guidance
Ya Ar-Rasheed, guide me in every matter
Ya Ar-Rasheed, make my ending rightly guided
Ya Ar-Rasheed, make me among the guided
